---
title: "Syntra"
page-layout: full
---

:::{.hero}
# Towards Open Quran Research

### *For The Self-Correcting Seeker*

[Explore Research →](docs/scholar/README.md){.btn}
[Browse Papers →](docs/scholar/database_graph.html){.btn}
:::

## Research Focus

**Syntra** is an open research project exploring the intersection of:

- **Mathematical linguistics** - Formal analysis of classical Arabic
- **Machine learning** - NLP for Quranic text understanding
- **Graph databases** - Semantic relationship mapping
- **Epistemology** - Methods for self-correcting interpretation

## Core Modules

:::{.grid}
:::col
### Scholar
Research methodology and tools for Quranic studies.

[View Documentation →](docs/scholar/README.md)
:::

:::col
### Geometer  
Mathematical foundations and formal systems.

[View Documentation →](docs/geometer/README.md)
:::

:::col
### Scribe
Transcription utility for research workflows.

[View Documentation →](docs/scribe/index.md)
:::
:::

## Open Science

This research is conducted openly and reproducible. All methodology, datasets, and tools are freely available.

[![Hugging Face](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hugging%20Face-Syntra--Env-yellow?style=flat)](https://huggingface.co/Syntra-Env)
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/Zenodo-Syntra-blue?style=flat)](https://zenodo.org/communities/syntra)

## License

MIT License - See [GitHub](https://github.com/Syntra-Env) for details.
